                        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-ch-white">{Math.floor(totalClicks).toLocaleString()}</div>
                        <p className="text-[10px] text-[#4285F4] font-bold mt-1">Tr√°fego Qualificado</p>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
                <Card className="bg-white/[0.02] border-white/5">
                    <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-ch-text-muted">Investimento</CardTitle>
                        <DollarSign className="w-4 h-4 text-ch-orange" />
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-ch-white">R$ {totalSpend.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}</div>
                        <p className="text-[10px] text-ch-orange font-bold mt-1">ROI Controlado</p>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
                <Card className="bg-white/[0.02] border-white/5">
                    <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-ch-text-muted">CTR M√©dio</CardTitle>
                        <TrendingUp className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-500" />
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-ch-white">{avgCtr.toFixed(2)}%</div>
                        <p className="text-[10px] text-purple-500 font-bold mt-1">Relev√Ґncia dos An√Їncios</p>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <motion.div variants={item} className="lg:col-span-2 glass-card rounded-3xl p-6 border-white/5">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                        <h3 className="text-sm font-black text-ch-white uppercase tracking-tight">Evolu√І√£o Di√°ria</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div className="h-[300px] w-full">
                        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                            <AreaChart data={chartData}>
                                <defs>
                                    <linearGradient id="colorImpressions" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                                        <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0.3} />
                                        <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0} />
                                    </linearGradient>
                                    <linearGradient id="colorClicks" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                                        <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#4285F4" stopOpacity={0.3} />
                                        <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#4285F4" stopOpacity={0} />
                                    </linearGradient>
                                </defs>
                                <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#ffffff10" vertical={false} />
                                <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#ffffff40" fontSize={10} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
                                <YAxis stroke="#ffffff40" fontSize={10} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} tickFormatter={(value) => `${value}`} />
                                <Tooltip
                                    contentStyle={{ backgroundColor: '#111', borderColor: '#333', borderRadius: '8px' }}
                                    itemStyle={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}
                                    labelStyle={{ color: '#888', marginBottom: '4px' }}
                                />
                                <Area type="monotone" dataKey="impressions" stroke="#10b981" strokeWidth={2} fillOpacity={1} fill="url(#colorImpressions)" />
                                <Area type="monotone" dataKey="clicks" stroke="#4285F4" strokeWidth={2} fillOpacity={1} fill="url(#colorClicks)" />
                            </AreaChart>
                        </ResponsiveContainer>
                    </div>
                </motion.div>

                {/* Geo Performance Detailed Table */}
                <motion.div variants={item} className="glass-card rounded-3xl p-6 border-white/5 space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                        <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-ch-orange" />
                        <div>
                            <h3 className="text-sm font-black text-ch-white uppercase tracking-tight">Performance por Unidade/Pra√Іa</h3>
                            <p className="text-[10px] text-ch-text-dimmed font-medium">An√°lise de canibaliza√І√£o e CPC</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="space-y-1">
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 text-[9px] uppercase font-black text-ch-text-muted px-2 py-1">
                            <div className="col-span-2">Regi√£o/Cidade</div>
                            <div className="text-right">CPC</div>
                            <div className="text-right">CPM</div>
                        </div>
                        {geoPerformance?.slice(0, 8).map((geo, i) => {
                            const cpc = (geo.cost_micros / 1000000 / (geo.clicks || 1));
                            const cpm = (geo.cost_micros / 1000000 / (geo.impressions || 1)) * 1000;

                            return (
                                <div key={i} className="grid grid-cols-4 items-center p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5 last:border-0">
                                    <div className="col-span-2">
                                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-ch-white">{geo.city_name || geo.region_name}</p>
                                        <p className="text-[8px] text-ch-text-dimmed">{geo.region_name}</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-right">
                                        <p className={`text-[10px] font-bold ${cpc > 5 ? 'text-rose-500' : 'text-emerald-500'}`}>R$ {cpc.toFixed(2)}</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-right">
                                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-ch-text-muted">R$ {cpm.toFixed(2)}</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            );
                        })}
                    </div>

                    <Button variant="ghost" className="w-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-ch-text-muted hover:text-ch-white hover:bg-white/5 h-8 rounded-xl">
                        Ver todas as 50 unidades
                    </Button>
                </motion.div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
"
  }
]
